title: Yada` #3047
definition:
Jada = "He knows"

 1) a Judahite, son of Onam and brother of Shammai, in the genealogy
    of the sons of Jerahmeel by his wife Atarah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jada = "He knows"

 1) a Judahite, son of Onam and brother of Shammai, in the genealogy
    of the sons of Jerahmeel by his wife Atarah

    NASB:  the shrewd one, a man of Judah
